title: Crypto Policy Pivot
one_line_summary: U.S. policy tone toward crypto may be improving, but implementation durability remains contested.
claims: Recent political and regulatory signals suggest a more accommodative stance toward crypto than in the prior cycle.
Narrative strength is rising faster than durable implementation proof.
counterpoints: Political messaging can improve faster than actual regulatory implementation.
Short-term sentiment may overstate structural policy change.
actionSignals: Monitor whether softer rhetoric converts into durable rulemaking.
Track enforcement posture change, not just speeches.

title: AI Infra Overbuild
one_line_summary: AI infrastructure spending is accelerating faster than proven monetization, strengthening the overbuild narrative.
claims: CAPEX into AI infrastructure is outpacing demonstrated downstream revenue capture.
Power and compute bottlenecks are becoming part of the same narrative cluster.
counterpoints: Infrastructure often looks excessive before applications catch up.
The market may be underestimating delayed monetization instead of overbuilding.
actionSignals: Power-linked infrastructure becoming a recurring signal
evidence: Energy-demand narratives linked to AI buildout
